description:
# Foundation — Fork Identity

Rename all opencode identity to ava/protocli. Update binary name, global config/data paths, database filename, CLI scriptName, and all user-facing strings. Creates a clean fork baseline with zero functional changes.

## Phases
1. Binary, paths, and config dirs
2. TUI branding — logo and color theme
title: [Epic] Foundation — Fork Identity
